acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /files/:id endpoint created with JwtAuthGuard, PermissionsGuard, FILES.VIEW permission, UUID validation, returns FileResDto
File metadata endpoint validates access: file exists, domainID match, not soft-deleted, owner or has FILES.VIEW permission. Returns 403 if unauthorized, 404 if not found/wrong domain
GET /files/:id/download endpoint created with guards and permissions, generates pre-signed S3 URL (15 min expiry), returns DownloadUrlResDto
Pre-signed URL generation uses @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner, 900 seconds expiry, validates access first, returns URL, expiresAt (ISO 8601), expiresIn (seconds)
Download endpoint response: { success: true, data: { downloadUrl, expiresAt, expiresIn } } with valid S3 pre-signed URL
Client can download file from pre-signed URL via GET (no auth headers), returns file binary with Content-Type, works in browser/curl, expires after 15 min
Download access logged (info level) with fileID, userID, domainID, timestamp. Does NOT log pre-signed URL

docs.doc: Complete AC specifications (AC-4.3.1 through AC-4.3.7) for file download via pre-signed URLs. Details access control, security patterns, and error handling.
FilesService design with IFilesService interface. Defines getFileMetadata() and generateDownloadUrl() method signatures.
File download flow diagram showing FilesController → FilesService → S3Service → Pre-signed URL generation.
DownloadUrlResDto structure with downloadUrl, expiresAt, expiresIn fields.
Pre-signed URL API specifications: 15 minute expiry, security considerations, no URL logging.
Access control patterns: owner check, FILES.VIEW permission, domain isolation, soft-delete filtering, 404 for wrong domain.
Epic-level story breakdown: file download via pre-signed URLs with permission checks and domain isolation.
FilesService structure, File entity schema, FileResDto, testing patterns. S3Service.getPresignedUrl() already implemented.
File entity in prisma/schema.prisma (lines 187-209) with s3Key field for pre-signed URLs. FILES.VIEW permission already defined.

file.reason: Contains getPresignedUrl() method (lines 26-31 interface, implementation exists) - REUSE for pre-signed URL generation
Need to ADD getFileMetadata() and generateDownloadUrl() methods to this existing service
Need to ADD GET /files/:id and GET /files/:id/download endpoints to existing controller
REUSE for GET /files/:id response (already has correct structure)
File entity with s3Key field needed for pre-signed URLs, domainID/userID for access control
FILES.VIEW permission constant (already defined in Story 4.2)
Existing E2E test suite - ADD download tests here

constraints.constraint: Controller-Service pattern: FilesController → FilesService → S3Service → AWS S3
Domain isolation mandatory: file.domainID === currentUserDomainID on all queries
Owner access: file.userID === currentUserID OR hasPermission(FILES.VIEW)
Soft-delete filtering: file.deletedAt === null (always exclude deleted files)
Return 404 (not 403) for wrong domain to prevent information leakage
Never log pre-signed URLs - they contain AWS credentials (X-Amz-Signature)
Pre-signed URL expiry: 900 seconds (15 minutes) - security vs UX balance
File not found / wrong domain / soft-deleted → 404 Not Found
Not authorized (not owner, no permission) → 403 Forbidden
Extract domainID from JWT via @CurrentUser decorator
Reuse existing components: S3Service.getPresignedUrl(), FileResDto, File entity - DO NOT recreate

interfaces.interface: Generate pre-signed S3 download URL. Default expiry: 900 seconds (15 minutes). REUSE from Story 4.1 - already implemented.

interface.name: IFilesService.getFileMetadata
interface.signature: getFileMetadata(fileId: string, domainID: string, userID: string, hasViewPermission: boolean): Promise<File>

interfaces.interface: NEW METHOD to add. Retrieve file metadata with access control validation (domain, ownership, soft-delete, permission checks).

interface.name: IFilesService.generateDownloadUrl
interface.signature: generateDownloadUrl(fileId: string, domainID: string, userID: string, hasViewPermission: boolean): Promise<DownloadUrlResDto>

interfaces.interface: NEW METHOD to add. Validate access via getFileMetadata(), call S3Service.getPresignedUrl(), return DownloadUrlResDto with URL and expiry info.
NEW ENDPOINT. Guards: JwtAuthGuard, PermissionsGuard. Permission: FILES.VIEW. Returns file metadata.
NEW ENDPOINT. Guards: JwtAuthGuard, PermissionsGuard. Permission: FILES.VIEW. Returns pre-signed S3 URL.

interface.name: FileResDto
interface.signature: { id, filename, originalName, mimeType, size, sizeFormatted, createdAt }

interfaces.interface: EXISTING DTO from Story 4.2. REUSE for GET /files/:id response. Excludes sensitive fields: s3Key, s3Bucket, domainID, userID, deletedAt.

interface.name: DownloadUrlResDto
interface.signature: { downloadUrl: string, expiresAt: string, expiresIn: number }

interfaces.interface: NEW DTO to create. downloadUrl: S3 pre-signed URL. expiresAt: ISO 8601 timestamp. expiresIn: 900 seconds.

interface.name: File Entity
interface.signature: File { id, domainID, userID, filename, originalName, mimeType, size, s3Key, s3Bucket, createdAt, deletedAt }

interfaces.interface: EXISTING entity from Story 4.2. Use s3Key for pre-signed URL generation. Access control on domainID, userID, deletedAt.

tests.standards: Testing framework: Jest. Unit tests for services with mocked dependencies (PrismaService, S3Service). Integration tests using Supertest for endpoint testing with test database. E2E tests with MinIO (local S3) for full flow validation. Test coverage target: 90%+ for services, 80%+ for controllers.

ideas.idea: Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → file exists, owner → Returns File entity
Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → file exists, user has FILES.VIEW → Returns File entity
Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → file not found → Throws NotFoundException
Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → wrong domain → Throws NotFoundException (not 403)
Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → soft-deleted → Throws NotFoundException
Unit: FilesService.getFileMetadata() → not owner, no FILES.VIEW → Throws ForbiddenException
Unit: FilesService.generateDownloadUrl() → mock S3Service.getPresignedUrl() → Returns DownloadUrlResDto
Unit: FilesService.generateDownloadUrl() → S3 error → Throws ServiceUnavailableException
Unit: DownloadUrlResDto → correct structure (downloadUrl, expiresAt, expiresIn)
Integration: GET /files/:id (owner) → 200 OK with FileResDto
Integration: GET /files/:id (user with FILES.VIEW) → 200 OK with FileResDto
Integration: GET /files/:id (user without FILES.VIEW) → 403 Forbidden
Integration: GET /files/:id (wrong domain) → 404 Not Found
Integration: GET /files/:id (soft-deleted) → 404 Not Found
Integration: GET /files/:id/download (owner) → 200 OK with DownloadUrlResDto
Integration: GET /files/:id/download (user with FILES.VIEW) → 200 OK with DownloadUrlResDto
Integration: GET /files/:id/download (no permission) → 403 Forbidden
E2E: Upload file → GET /files/:id/download → Download from pre-signed URL → Verify file content
E2E: Upload file → Soft delete → GET /files/:id/download → 404 Not Found
E2E: Upload file as userA → Login as userB (different domain) → GET /files/:id → 404 Not Found
